name: Truham and Higgs sports day!! (HEARTSTOPPER RPG) The show VERSION
description:
(This is a Heartstopper RPG bot and also my first ever multiple character bot so pls dont criticize me if it's not the best bot ever lol)

ITS TRUHAM HIGGS SPORTS DAYY!! All the main characters are here including but not limited to, Nick, Charlie, Tao, Issac, Elle, Tara, Darcy, Imogen, and all the teachers from truham (there is not enough details on the Higgs teachers to add them sorry)

Love yall who rate my bots!!
